records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Subsidized (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Subsidizing (?).]

defs: To furnish with a subsidy; to purchase the assistance of by the payment of a subsidy; to aid or promote, as a private enterprise, with public money; as, to subsidize a steamship line.
quotes: He employed the remittances from Spain to subsidize a large body of German mercenaries.
